item.title:
jamierkennedy: Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1min Next career goal for Rory?
Only two players in the history of the sport have won ea
item.description:
Jamie Kennedy @jamierkennedy · 1min Next career goal for Rory?
Only two players in the history of the sport have won each of the majors multiple times.
Jack and Tiger.
McIlroy is just one more Open and US Open from doing that.
(FYI, those venues next year at St Andrews and Pebble...) 1 106

item.title: JoshACarpenter: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 2min Here are the player shot totals for CBS's final round coverage of @TheMasters ye
item.description: Josh Carpenter @JoshACarpenter · 2min Here are the player shot totals for CBS's final round coverage of @TheMasters yesterday. Total was at 391, up from 337 last year 75

item.title: JustinRayGolf: Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 11min Rory McIlroy went 10 major championship seasons without a win, then won his 5th and 6t
item.description:
Justin Ray @JustinRayGolf · 11min Rory McIlroy went 10 major championship seasons without a win, then won his 5th and 6th majors.
He's the 2nd in the men's game to have a 10+ year drought then win multiple majors.
Julius Boros won the 1952 U.S. Open, 1962 U.S. Open & '68 PGA.
h/t @KylePorterNS for question 1 15 2 mil

item.title: ShaneRyanHere: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 12min this was fun both to think about and write, Rory always gets the neurons firing Cita S
item.description: Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 12min this was fun both to think about and write, Rory always gets the neurons firing Cita Shane Ryan @ShaneRyanHere · 4h Rory has something deep inside that drives him to greatness and protects him from collapse even in the midst of sometimes long struggle, and it goes beyond resilience or ego and has nothing to do with whether he's a good guy. On the secret ingredient: https:// golfdigest.com/story/masters- 2026--we-re-still-missing-the-thing-that-makes-rory-grea … 1 1 mil
